episodes.title: The Epstein Scandal Was Just the Tip of the Iceberg
episodes.description:
A prison so brutal that judges reduce sentences just to compensate for the conditions inside.
Not hidden, not secret, but sitting in the heart of Manhattan.

The Metropolitan Correctional Center was once hailed as a revolutionary step forward. But over time, it became something else entirely - overcrowded, decaying, and dangerously neglected.

From freezing cells and vermin infestations to corruption, abuse, and systemic failure, this facility exposed the dark reality behind the U.S. prison system.
And when Jeffrey Epstein died inside its walls, it revealed just how broken that system had become.

This isn’t just the story of a prison, It’s the story of a collapse.

CHAPTERS:
0:00 - Inside the Hellhole Where Epstein Died
1:02 - Overcrowding Turned MCC Into a Nightmare
2:17 - The Brutal Isolation of 10 South
3:26 - Rot, Rats, and Conditions Judges Punished
6:44 - The Real Problem: MCC’s Staff
8:32 - How Neglect Helped Epstein Die
12:21 - Beatings, Corruption, and Cover-Ups
18:19 - The Failures That Led to Epstein’s Death

Narrated by: Josh Risser

episodes.title: Grew Up in a Sex Cult – THIS Is What She Wants You to Know
episodes.description:
The Children of God: what started as a counterculture movement quickly became a global cult rooted in perverse, innapropriate enlightenment. In today's video, find out how Serena Kelley endured a traumatic childhood and ultimately made it out the other side.

episodes.title: Mysterious Death Cult That Poisoned Tokyo Subway
episodes.description: Japan is no stranger to cults, but none have matched the Aum Shinrikyo. In this episode, we delve into the chilling story of Aum Shinrikyo, the cult led by Shoko Asahara. From its humble beginnings to its terrifying acts of bioterrorism, we explore how Aum Shinrikyo grew from a small spiritual group to a dangerous organization that shook Japan and the world.
